matches.summary:
Krafton reported record Q1 results, with revenue up 56.9% to ₩1.37 trillion ($931 million) and operating profit at ₩561.6 billion ($381.3 million).

Read more
matches.title: Krafton Q1 revenue up 56.9% to $931m, driven by mobile content

matches.summary:
Digital Bros. has acquired the Wuchang: Fallen Feathers IP from developer Chengdu Lingze Technology Co. Ltd (also known as Leenzee) for around $4.6 million.

matches.title: Digital Bros. acquires Wuchang: Fallen Feathers IP for $4.6m
